must_do.full_text:
Get paid to wait

The Claude Code spinner might be the most watched line on Earth.

So I turned it into an ad marketplace.

Advertisers bid on it. You keep 50% of the money.

Install the extension → get cash from ads.

Introducing Kickbacks https://t.co/hcWRQAqKL2
must_do.summary: 用户推出Kickbacks浏览器扩展，将Claude Code加载动画转化为广告市场，用户可获得50%收益。具体产品、创意商业模式、明确收益分配。
angles: Claude加载条也能赚钱？这个扩展让你被动收入

反转：最烦人的加载动画成了提款机

must_do.full_text:
We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program matching people early in their careers with US nonprofits.

We'll teach 1,000 people to use Claude, and pay them to use AI to advance their hosts’ missions.

https://t.co/QI6JmlAdSr

must_do.full_text:
We’ve reached an agreement to acquire @ona_hq.

Its secure cloud execution technology will help Codex take on longer-running work, even when laptops are closed, and help more organizations deploy agents securely in production.

After closing, Ona will join OpenAI’s Codex team.
must_do.summary: OpenAI收购Ona公司，获得安全云执行技术。将增强Codex处理长期任务能力，支持组织在生产环境中安全部署AI代理。
viral_signals: 明确的战略意图：云执行+代理部署
angles: OpenAI悄悄收购Ona，要让AI代理24小时工作
云执行技术加持，Codex能做什么新事了？

priority.full_text:
create super exclusive birthday cards 

1. Open ChatGPT
2. Upload your Photo
3. Paste Prompt (in alt + below) 

Works well for adults, kids, animals… https://t.co/QunzXiK7bd

media.ext_alt_text: Professional luxury birthday poster, 3:4 ratio. Entire frame filled with a premium off white luxury paper textured wall. Large number “6” precisely carved in the wall with visible depth and realistic inner shadows. Inside the number: soft blue and blue balloons, subtle white flowers, elegant bouquet arrangement, premium celebration styling. A happy 6 year old child with preserved reference facial features, wearing a milky white T shirt and dark denim overalls, laughing naturally. Face, shoulder, one hand and one foot extend outside the number creating a realistic 3D effect. Warm cinematic sunlight from one side, soft rim light, photorealistic skin, premium studio photography, ultra realistic, sharp focus. Typography on wall: SKY LOU, CHAPTER 6, 365 MORE DAYS OF WONDER. Clean minimalist layout, luxury magazine cover aesthetic, high end art direction, realistic shadows, natural colors, no tree shadows, no fake lighting, no AI artifacts.

Professional luxury birthday poster, 3:4 ratio. Entire frame filled with a premium off white luxury paper textured wall. Large number “4” precisely carved in the wall with visible depth and realistic inner shadows. Inside the number: soft pink and pink balloons, subtle white and pink, elegant bouquet arrangement, premium celebration styling. A happy 4 year old child with preserved reference facial features, wearing a milky white T shirt and pink summery dress, laughing naturally. Face, shoulder, one hand and one foot extend outside the number creating a realistic 3D effect. Warm cinematic sunlight from one side, soft rim light, photorealistic skin, premium studio photography, ultra realistic, sharp focus. Typography on wall: POPPY MAE, CHAPTER 4, 365 MORE DAYS OF SUNSHINE. Clean minimalist layout, luxury magazine cover aesthetic, high end art direction, realistic shadows, natural colors, no tree shadows, no fake lighting, no AI artifacts.
